title: koeleria macrantha var. fenzliana
intro: Koeleria macrantha var. fenzliana, also known as Fenzli's June-grass, is a perennial grass species commonly found in mountainous regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Koeleria macrantha var. fenzliana include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of Koeleria macrantha var. fenzliana are typically made by drying the plant's aerial parts, which can then be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
